title: huperzia trifoliata
intro: Huperzia trifoliata, also known as the three-leafed club moss or firmoss, is a type of evergreen perennial plant belonging to the family Huperziaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Huperzia trifoliata include potential anti-cancer and neuroprotective effects, as well as the ability to improve cognitive function and memory. Herbal preparations of Huperzia trifoliata are typically made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and stems, which can be consumed as capsules, teas, or added to supplements.
